subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-18
subcodes.first_line: If a delegation of Baha'is should go to Japan they will do splendid work, because the Japanese think their own religion is out of date. Even the Mikado
subcodes.subjects: @power of the mind over nature, @one universal law; attractive power of love, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @the human soul
